p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion from tx.fhir.org based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2025
This value set contains 2 concepts

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ActReason v3.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 6 concepts
**Definition:**The patient currently has a medical condition for which the vaccine is contraindicated or for which precaution is warranted.
**Definition:**Testing has shown that the patient already has immunity to the agent targeted by the immunization.
**Definition:**The patient or their guardian objects to receiving the vaccine.
**Definition:**There was no supply of the product on hand to perform the service.
Definition: Patient has had a prior allergic intolerance response to alternate product or one of its components.
**Definition:**Therapy has been changed and new prescription issued

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication origin Type v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 6 concepts

tr.td: Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription
Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription

display.value: Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription
Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication Line Registration Status v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 3 concepts

title.value: Medication Line Registration Status Value Set

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication status codes v4.0.1 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 1 concepts

tr.td: Some of the actions that are implied by the medication statement may have occurred. For example, the patient may have taken some of the medication. Clinical decision support systems should take this status into account.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medicationrequest status v4.0.1 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 5 concepts

tr.td: The prescription is 'actionable', but not all actions that are implied by it have occurred yet.
All actions that are implied by the prescription have occurred.
The prescription has been withdrawn before any administrations have occurred
Actions implied by the prescription are to be permanently halted, before all of the administrations occurred. This should not be used if the original order was entered in error

Some of the actions that are implied by the medication request may have occurred. For example, the medication may have been dispensed and the patient may have taken some of the medication. Clinical decision support systems should take this status into account

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication request reimbursement type v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 9 concepts

tr.td: Second dose + [date of the first dose]
Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]

display.value: Second dose + [date of the first dose]
Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication preparation Type v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 3 concepts

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion from tx.fhir.org based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2025
This value set contains 83 concepts

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem BeCdHcParty v2.1.2 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 7 concepts

tr.td: pharmacy service or department within an organisation

display.value: pharmacy service or department within an organisation
